title: Accept decimal number inputs in transaction and customer forms

requirements.text: Update the TransactionEntryForm fields for quantity, rate, and payment to accept decimal (floating-point) numbers. Change input types from integer to allow decimal values (e.g., step='any' or step='0.01'), and update validation logic to parse float instead of integer.

quotes: Decimal number also want to accept plz

acceptanceCriteria: User can enter decimal values (e.g., 1.5, 10.25) in quantity, rate, and payment fields
Form does not reject or truncate decimal inputs
Computed totals (total amount, net credit) correctly reflect decimal arithmetic

requirements.text: Update the AddCustomerModal's previous credit field to accept decimal numbers, allowing float input instead of integer only.

quotes: Decimal number also want to accept plz

acceptanceCriteria: Previous credit field in AddCustomerModal accepts decimal values (e.g., 250.75)
Submitted value is passed as a float to the backend mutation

requirements.text: Update the backend Motoko actor to store and process numeric fields (quantity, rate, payment amounts, credit balances) as Float instead of Int or Nat, ensuring all related calculations (totals, credit balances) support decimal precision.

quotes: Decimal number also want to accept plz

acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts Float values for quantity, rate, payment, and credit fields
Stored transaction and credit values retain decimal precision
All balance and total calculations are performed with Float arithmetic

requirements.text: Update useTransactionCalculations hook to use float parsing (parseFloat) instead of integer parsing (parseInt) for all numeric inputs so that computed totals and net credit correctly handle decimal values.

quotes: Decimal number also want to accept plz

acceptanceCriteria: Hook returns correct decimal totals when inputs contain decimal values
No rounding or truncation of decimal values in computed results

constraints: Do not change authentication or role-based access control logic
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
nonGoals: Adding new form fields or changing the overall form layout
Changing currency formatting or localization beyond decimal support
Modifying offline queue structure beyond float value compatibility
